title: Check if inject messages reach Discord users

log.context: Check if inject messages reach Discord users

Now I have a complete picture. Here's the full analysis:

---

## Findings

### 1. Do inject messages reach Discord users? NO.

The inject endpoint at `http://127.0.0.1:9876/inject` sends an `mcp.notification()` directly to the Claude Code session as a synthetic MCP notification (method: `notifications/claude/channel`). It **never calls the Discord bot API** and therefore **never posts anything to Discord**. Real Discord users see nothing.
